title: Marudhani
subTitle: Manikam, a teacher, comes to work in a village and stays in Marudhani's house. Later, Marudhani falls in love with him after he protects her dignity.

title: Senthamizh Paattu
subTitle: Despite his mother's objection to singing songs, Bala develops an interest in music. He falls in love with Durga, a rich girl with whose family his mother's miseries are interlinked.

title: Manandhal Mahadevan
subTitle: After returning from the States, Raja receives a marriage proposal from a wealthy family. Accompanied by his driver, Mahadevan, Raja meets the bride, but Mahadevan ends up getting married to her.

title: Nadodi Pattukkaran
subTitle: Sundaram, a musician, travels from one place to another along with his troupe. One day, the troupe drives away a group of robbers who terrorise a village and subsequently, they settle there.

title: Ponnana Neram
subTitle: A young college girl, who enjoys playing pranks on others, gets into trouble with a group of terrorists. A brave police officer comes to her rescue and sets on a mission to wipe out the gang.

title: Parisam Pottachu
subTitle: Susheela suffers from infertility due to a tragic miscarriage. Later, she begins to care for a mentally disturbed and pregnant girl but then learns the truth about the pregnancy.

title: Karpura Mullai
subTitle: Maya finds her long-lost mother, who is a popular singer. Her mother refuses to reveal her father's identity and instead decides to publicly declare Maya as her daughter.

title: Pattukku Oru Thalaivan
subTitle: Devastated by Shanthi's rejection, Arivu turns to alcoholism to drown his despair. However, beneath her silence lies a hidden truth that could shatter their past and redefine their futures.

title: Ponnana Neram
subTitle: A young college girl, who enjoys playing pranks on others, gets into trouble with a group of terrorists. A brave police officer comes to her rescue and sets on a mission to wipe out the gang.

title: Sami Potta Mudichu
subTitle: Kadhirvelan wishes to take revenge on his uncle, who is responsible for his grandfather's death. However, he changes his mind after he meets Neelaveni, his uncle's daughter.

title: Chain Jayapal
subTitle: Three college friends reunite and work together to incriminate a dangerous criminal who framed one of them for murdering a young woman.

title: Thangappathakkam
subTitle: SP Choudhury, a police officer, and his rebelious son's relationship becomes strained after the son gets arrested for illegal activities.

title: Kozhi Koovuthu
subTitle: Velusamy, a jobless man, desires to marry his niece Kamatchi. He joins the army to earn a living so that he can marry her. Meanwhile, Kamatchi falls in love with Ramakrishnan, the village postman.

title: Aanazhagan
subTitle: Raja disguises himself as a married woman to find a rental house for his friends. However, trouble brews when he falls for the landlady's daughter.

title: Kalyana Vaibhogam
subTitle: Santhi, an ardent admirer of Sakthi, a writer, falls in love with him and sends him anonymous letters. But problems arise when he mistakes his secret lady admirer for someone else.

title: Engeyo Ketta Kural
subTitle: Ponni wants to live a lavish life but gets married to her cousin Kumaran. Her love for worldly pleasures makes her abandon Kumaran and her daughter for a richer man.

title: Kudiyarasu
subTitle: Kannan, an investigative journalist, finds evidence that Ambalavanan, a minister, is scamming innocent people. He sets out to expose Ambalavanan and end his fraudulent activities.

title: Aranmanai Kavalan
subTitle: Sakthi takes upon himself to protect and fight for every Tamilian thriving in Mumbai. When he meets the wife of the late community-chief, he makes up his mind to resolve her family issues.
